subcodes.first_line: All praise unto the Sanctified Lord, glorified be His power, Who hath ordained that the tyranny of the unjust and the violence of the oppressors
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش پاک پروردگاریرا جلت قدرته که ظلم ظالمین و تعدی معتدین را
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @martyrs and martyrdom, @growth of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
